title: Iran is in the 'process of blinking' over the Strait of Hormuz, Petraeus says
summary_full: Ex-CIA director David Petraeus said that an initial successful peace deal with Tehran would see the Strait opened without any conditions.
summary_public: Ex-CIA director David Petraeus said that an initial successful peace deal with Tehran would see the Strait opened without any conditions.
